select_model.title: Select Device Model
select_model.description: Select your Omron blood pressure monitor model.

pairing.title: Pair Device
pairing.description:
Put your Omron {model} in pairing mode:

1. Hold the Bluetooth button until **-P-** appears on the display
2. Click **Submit** below to start pairing

If pairing fails, make sure the device is showing -P- and try again.

error.pairing_failed: Pairing failed. Make sure the device is in pairing mode (-P- on display) and try again.
error.decryption_failed: The provided bindkey did not work, sensor data could not be decrypted. Please check it and try again.
